non_compliance_flags.message: Achieved min illuminance 150 lux at SE corner fails BS EN 12464-1 §4.4 per-point requirement (must be ≥ 0.7 × target 500 = 350 lux). Cause: 16 panels clustered in central 4.5×4.5 m area; perimeter 2 m strip unlit. Redistribute into uniform 4×5 grid OR add 4 perimeter panels.

Achieved U₀ = 0.31 fails the 0.6 open_plan_office target. 6× max-to-min ratio (908 lux centre vs 150 lux corners) is the clustered-grid signature. Engineer-of-record must redistribute luminaires before lighting-layout full_drawing sign-off.
non_compliance_flags.reference: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 uniformity requirement + Table 5.3 row 5.34
